app_description: Shared Wallet is a platform for shared wallet.

hero.title: AI customer support bot
hero.subtitle: Automatically answer customer questions 24/7 and escalate to your team with full context.

features.title: AI sales bot that never misses a lead
features.lead: Turn every message into an order: respond 24/7, follow your script, capture phone/address, and help you scale ads without hiring more staff.

pair1.leftDesc: Hundreds of messages arrive at once, leaving your team unable to respond in time and causing you to miss potential customers.
pair1.rightTitle: AI filters leads & follows your script
pair1.rightDesc: Qualify needs, respond instantly 24/7, and guide customers to place an order.

pair2.leftDesc: Covering nights/weekends is expensive, yet response quality still varies.
pair2.rightDesc: Customers messaging at 12–1am still get a reply—so orders keep flowing and you save costs.

pair3.leftDesc: A few minutes of delay can send customers to competitors. You can't control who was helped and who was left behind.
pair3.rightTitle: Close with a smart order script
pair3.rightDesc: Guide customers from interest to confirmation (phone/address) to create orders faster.

pair4.leftDesc: Traditional solutions require ops/engineering teams, are harder to scale, and take time to train.
pair4.rightDesc: Set up in minutes. Scale your campaigns without worrying you don't have anyone closing deals.

features.item2Desc: Answers using your docs and tone settings.
features.item3Desc: Escalates complex cases to your team with full conversation context.

row3.leftBul3: Route leads to deals even during live streams
row3.chatAssistantMsg: Captured the request. We will confirm shortly.

basic.name: Basic plan
basic.bul7: AI auto-comment & auto-reply to customer messages

advanced.name: Advanced plan
advanced.bul7: AI auto-comment & auto-reply to customer messages

enterprise.name: Enterprise plan
enterprise.bul7: AI auto-comment & auto-reply to customer messages

jobs.title: Join our team
jobs.desc: We’re building the next generation of automated customer support.
jobs.role1Desc: Build polished chat dashboards and UI with Next.js and React.
jobs.role2Desc: Connect CRMs, helpdesk tools, and webhooks to power the bot.

cta.title: Ready to reduce support load?
cta.desc: Create an account and launch your bot in minutes.

mock.bubble1You: Hi, I’m looking for a new pair of glasses.
mock.bubble1Rep: Hello! I’m EVE, your AI assistant. Do you prefer frames that are lightweight or more stylish?
mock.bubble2You: Lightweight please, I have sensitive skin.
mock.bubble2Rep: Got it! Our titanium frames are hypoallergenic and very comfortable.
mock.bubble3You: Can you show me some options?
mock.bubble3Rep: Sure! We have Combo 1: Classic Titanium ($120), Combo 2: Modern Titanium ($150), Combo 3: Sport Titanium ($130).
mock.bubble4You: What’s the difference between Classic and Modern?
mock.bubble4Rep: Classic is timeless, suitable for office and daily use. Modern has a slimmer design, trendier for young adults.
mock.bubble5You: Do they come with lenses included?
mock.bubble5Rep: Yes, all combos include standard anti-scratch lenses. Optional blue light lenses can be added.
mock.bubble6You: I like the Modern one. Can I add blue light lenses?
mock.bubble6Rep: Absolutely! That will be an extra $20.
mock.bubble7You: Ok, I’ll take Modern with blue light lenses.
mock.bubble7Rep: Great choice! To place the order, may I have your phone number?
mock.bubble8Rep: Thank you. Now please provide your delivery address (street/ward/district).
mock.bubble9Rep: Perfect! Your order is ready. Would you like to add a protective case and cleaning kit?
mock.bubble10Rep: Added to your order. Total comes to $170.
mock.bubble11Rep: Yes, COD is available. You can also pay via credit card or ZaloPay.
mock.bubble12Rep: Excellent! Your order has been placed. EVE will notify you once it’s shipped.
mock.bubble13Rep: Typically 2-3 business days within the city.
mock.bubble14Rep: Yes, all our glasses come with a 6-month warranty against manufacturing defects.
mock.bubble15You: Can I return it if I don’t like it?
mock.bubble15Rep: Of course, returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery if the product is in original condition.
mock.bubble16You: Do you have a store to try them?
mock.bubble16Rep: We have one showroom in District 1, you can try frames before ordering.
mock.bubble17You: I live far away, can I see frame pictures online?
mock.bubble17Rep: Yes, I can send high-quality photos of each combo. Which one do you want first?
mock.bubble19You: Looks good. I’ll stick with my order.
mock.bubble19Rep: Perfect! Your order remains Modern Titanium with blue light lenses and accessory kit. Total $170.
mock.bubble20Rep: You’re welcome! Your order confirmation ID is #MT-00123. EVE will keep you updated.
